questions.question: A Service Catalog may include which of the following components?

choices.text: Order Guides, Catalog Items, and Interceptors.
Catalog Items, Asset Contracts, Task Surveys.
Record Producers, Order Guides, and Catalog Items.

questions.question: Which one of the following statements applies to a set of fields when they are coalesced during an import?

choices.text: If a match is found using the coalesce fields, the existing record is updated with the information being imported.
If a match is not found using the coalesce fields, the system does not create a Transform Map.
If a match is found using the coalesce fields, the system creates a new record.
If a match is not found using the coalesce fields, the existing record is updated with the information being imported.

questions.question: As it relates to ServiceNow reporting, which of the following statements describes what a metric can do?

choices.text: A metric is a report gauge used on homepages to display real-time data.
A metric is a time measurement used to report the effectiveness of workflows and SLAs.
A metric is used to measure and evaluate the effectiveness of IT service management processes.
A metric is a comparative measurement used to report the effectiveness of flows and SLAs.

questions.question: The display sequence is controlled in a Service Catalog Item using which of the following?

choices.text: The Default Value field in the Catalog Item form
The Sequence field in the Catalog Item form
The Order field in the Variable form
The Choice field in the Variable form

questions.question: Reports can be created from which different places in the platform? (Choose two.)
Knowledge Base Search results can be sorted by which of the following? (Choose three.)
What is the path an Administrator could take to view the fulfillment stage task list for an order placed by a user?
Which term refers to application menus and modules which you may want to access quickly and often?
What is generated from the Service Catalog once a user places an order for an item or service?
From the User menu, which actions can a user select? (Choose three.)
Buttons, form links, and context menu items are all examples of what type of functionality?
Which of the following is true of Service Catalog Items in relation to the Service Catalog?
Table Access Control rules are processed in the following order:

choices.text: any table name (wildcard), parent table name, table name
table name, parent table name, any table name (wildcard)
parent table name, table name, any table name (wildcard)
any table name (wildcard), table name, parent table name

questions.question: What is the platform name for the User table?
A REQ number in the Service Catalog represents:

choices.text: the individual item in the order.

questions.question: Which would NOT appear in the History section of the Application Navigator?
Which one of the following statements is a recommendation from ServiceNow about Update Sets?

choices.text: Avoid using the Default Update set as an Update Set for moving customizations from instance to instance.
Before moving customizations from instance to instance with Update Sets, ensure that both instances are different version.
Use the Baseline Update Set to store the contents of items after they are changed the first time.
Once an Update Set is closed as “Complete”, change it back to “In Progress” until it is applied to another instance.

questions.question: Which of the following is used to initiate a flow?
For Administrators creating new Service Catalog items, what is a characteristic they should know about Service Catalog variables?

choices.text: Service Catalog variables can only be used in Record Producers.
Service Catalog variables can only be used in Order Guides.
Service Catalog variables cannot affect the order price.
Service Catalog variables are global by default.

questions.question: Which one of the following statements is true about Column Context Menus?

choices.text: It displays actions such as creating quick reports, configuring the list, and exporting data.
It displays actions related to filtering options, assigning tags, and search.
It displays actions related to viewing and filtering the entire list.
It displays actions such as view form, view related task, and add relationship.

questions.question: Which ServiceNow products can be used to discover and populate the CMDB? (Choose two.)
When using the Load Data and Transform Map process, what is the Mapping Assist used for?

choices.text: Mapping fields using the Import Log
Mapping fields using a Field Map

questions.question: Which one of the following statements describes the contents of the Configuration Management Database (CMDB)?

choices.text: The CMDB contains data about tangible and intangible business assets.
The CMDB contains the Business Rules that direct the intangible, configurable assets used by a company.
The CMDB archives all Service Management PaaS equipment metadata and usage statistics.
The CMDB contains ITIL process data pertaining to configuration items.

questions.question: In what order should filter elements be specified?
Which statement is true about business rules?

choices.text: A business rule must run before a database action occurs
A business rule can be a piece of Javascript
A business rule must not run before a database action occurs
A business rule monitors fields on a form

questions.question: Which of the following are a type of client scripts supported in ServiceNow? (Choose four.)
Which type of tables may be extended by other tables, but do not extend another table?
Which of the following statement describes the purpose of an Order Guide?

choices.text: Order Guides restrict the number of items in an order to only one item per request.
Order Guide provide a list of guidelines for Administrators on how to set up item variables.
Order Guide provide the ability to order multiple, related items as one request.
Order Guides take the user directly to the checkout without prompting for information.

questions.question: Which tool is used to have conversations with logged-in users in real-time?
Which of the following concepts are associated with the ServiceNow CMDB? (Choose four.)
What is a formatter? Select one of the following.

choices.text: A formatter allows you to configure applications on your instance.
A formatter is a form element used to display information that is not a field in the record.
A formatter allows you to populate fields automatically.
A formatter is a set of conditions applied to a table to help find and work with data.

questions.question: When searching using the App Navigator search field, what can be returned? (Choose four.)
Which technique is used to get information from a series of referenced fields from different tables?
What is a schema map?

choices.text: A schema map enables administrators to define records from specific tables as trouble sources for Configuration Items.
A schema map graphically organizes the visual task boards for the CMDB.
A schema map graphically displays the Configuration Items that support a business service.
A schema map displays the details of tables and their relationships in a visual manner, allowing administrators to view and easily access different parts of the database schema.

questions.question: Which one of the following statements best describes the purpose of an Update Set?

choices.text: An Update Set allows administrators to group a series of changes into a named set and then move this set as a unit to other systems.
By default, an Update Set includes customizations, Business Rules, and homepages.
An Update Set is a group of customizations that is moved from Production to Development.
By default, the changes included in an Update Set are visible only in the instance to which they are applied.

questions.question: Which of the following can be customized through the Basic Configuration UI16 module? (Choose three.)
What is the function of user impersonation?
What information does the System Dictionary contain?

choices.text: The human-readable labels and language settings
The definition for each table and column
The information on how tables relate to each other
The language dictionary used for spell checking

questions.question: When working on a form, what is the difference between Insert and Update operations?

choices.text: Insert creates a new record and Update saves changes, both remain on the form.
Insert creates a new record and Update saves changes, both exit the form.
Insert saves changes and exits the form, Update saves changes and remains on the form.
Insert saves changes and remains on the form, Update saves changes and exits the form.

questions.question: How is the Event Log different from the Event Registry?

choices.text: Event Log contains generated Events, the Event Registry is a table of Event definitions.
Event Log is formatted in the Log style, the Event Registry displays different fields.
Event Log lists Events that were triggered by integrations, the Event Registry lists the Events that were triggered during the day (24-hour period).
Event Log is the same as the Event Registry.

questions.question: What is a Dictionary Override?

choices.text: A Dictionary Override is an incoming customer update in an Update Set which applies to the same objects as a newer local customer update.
A Dictionary Override is the addition, modification, or removal of anything that could have an effect on IT services.
A Dictionary Override is a task within a flow that requests an action before the flow can continue.
A Dictionary Override sets field properties in extended tables.

questions.question: Which group of permissions is used to control Application and Module access?
What is a Record Producer?

choices.text: A Record Producer is a type of Catalog Item that is used for Requests, not Services.
A Record Producer creates user records.
A Record Producer is a type of Catalog Item that provides easy ordering by bundling requests.
A Record Producer is a type of a Catalog Item that allows users to create task-based records from the Service Catalog.

questions.question: Create Incident, Password Reset, and Report outage: what do these services in the Service Catalog have in common?

choices.text: They direct the user to a record producer
They direct the user to a catalog property
They direct the user to a catalog UI policy
They direct the user to a catalog client script

questions.question: What is the Import Set Table?

choices.text: A table where data will be placed, post-transformation
A staging area for imported records
A repository for Update Set information

questions.question: What is a characteristic of importing data into ServiceNow?

choices.text: An existing Transform Map can be used one time on the same import set
Coalesce fields are used only after running Transform
Any user can manage and set up import sets
An existing Transform Map can be used multiple times on the same import set

questions.question: What module in the Service Catalog application does an Administrator access to begin creating a new item?
Which of the following allows a user to edit field values in a list without opening the form?
Which three Variable Types can be added to a Service Catalog Item?

choices.text: Number List, Single Line Text, and Reference
Multiple Choice, Select Box, and Checkbox

questions.question: How are Workflows moved between instances?

choices.text: Workflows are moved using Update Sets
Workflows are moved using Transform Maps
Workflows are moved using Application Sets
Workflows cannot be moved between instances

questions.question: The baseline Service Catalog homepage contains links to which of the following components?

choices.text: Record Producers, Order Guides, and Catalog Items
Order Guides, Item Variables, and flows
Order Guides, Catalog Items, and flows
Record Producers, Order Guides, and Item Variables

questions.question: Which of the following statements is true when a new table is created by extending another table?

choices.text: The new table archives the parent table and assumed its roles in the database
The new table inherits all of the Business Rules, Client Scripts, and UI Policies of the parent table, but none of the existing fields
The new table inherits all of the fields of the parent table and can also contain new fields unique to itself
The new table inherits all of the fields, but does not inherit Access Control rules, Client Scripts, and UI Policies of the parent table

questions.question: Where can Admins check which release is running on a ServiceNow instance?
A knowledge article must be which of the following states to display to a user?
What is the name of the conversational bot platform that provides assistance to help users obtain information, make decisions, and perform common tasks?
What is the purpose of a Related List?

choices.text: To dot-walk to a core table

questions.question: Which one of the following statements describes the purpose of a Service Catalog flow?

choices.text: A Service Catalog flow generates three basic components: item variable types, tasks, and approvals
Although a Service Catalog flow cannot send notifications, the flow drives complex fulfillment processes
A Service Catalog flow is used to drive complex fulfillment processes and sends notifications to defined users or groups
A Service Catalog flow generates three basic components: item variable types, tasks, and notifications

questions.question: Which term best describes something that is created, has work performed upon it, and is eventually moved to a state of closed?
Which are valid ServiceNow User Authentication Methods? (Choose three.)
Access Control rules may be defined with which of the following permission requirements? (Choose three.)
Which section of the ServiceNow UI allows you to perform a global search?
How do you make a list filter available to everyone?

choices.text: Make active, assign a name, and save
Assign a group, set visibility, and save
Assign a name, set visibility, and save
Make active, set visibility, and save

questions.question: What would NOT appear in the Application Navigator if 'service' is typed into the filter field?
Which of the following is used to categorize, flag, and locate records?
Which tool should be used to populate commonly used fields in a form?
How is a group defined in ServiceNow?

choices.text: A group is one record stored in the Group Type [sys_user_group_type] table
A group is one record stored in the Group [sys_user_group] table
A group defines a set of users that share the same location
A group defines a set of users that share the same job title

questions.question: What is a role in ServiceNow?

choices.text: A role is one record in the Role [user_sys_role] table
A role is a set of modules for a particular application
A role is one record in the Role [sys_user_role] table
A role is a persona used in Live Feed Chat

questions.question: What is a Notification?

choices.text: A new Knowledge article created by a Business Rule
A tool for alerting users that events that concern them have occurred
A message through Connect related to a Change Request

questions.question: Which one of the following is NOT a type of Visual Task Board?
What is (are) best practice(s) regarding users/groups/roles? (Choose two.)

choices.text: You should never assign roles to groups.
You should assign roles to users.
You should add users to groups.
You should assign roles to groups.

questions.question: What are two ways to generate an Event? (Choose two.)
Which core table in the ServiceNow platform provides a series of standard fields used on each of the tables that extend it, such as the Incident [incident] and Problem [problem] tables?
Which of the following statements describes how data is organized in a table?

choices.text: A column is a field in the database and a record is one user
A column is one field and a record is one row
A column is one field and a record is one column
A column contains data from one user and a record is one set of fields

questions.question: What is a sys_id?

choices.text: Unique 32-character identifier that is assigned to every record
Unique 64-character identifier that is assigned to every record

questions.question: When creating a global custom table named 'abc', what is the table name that is automatically assigned by the platform?
Access Control rules may provide access security for which of the following database objects?

choices.text: For a specific role, group, or user
For a specific row, column, or table
For a specific CMDB Configuration item

questions.question: What is the primary application used to load data into ServiceNow?
Which of the following steps can be used to import new data into ServiceNow from a spreadsheet?

choices.text: Load Data, Create Transform Map, Run Transform
Define Data Source, Select Transform Map, Run Transform
Select Import Set, Select Transform Map, Run Transform

questions.question: Which tool is used for creating dependencies between configuration items in the CMDB?
What is the difference between a UI Policy and Data Policy?

choices.text: Data Policies run when data is entered through the form, by an Import Set, or by web services, while UI Policies are set only by web services
Data Policies can be converted into UI Policies, but UI Policies cannot be converted into Data Policies
Data Policies run regardless of how data is entered into ServiceNow, while UI Policies are used for form interactions
Data Policies run only after UI Policies run successfully

questions.question: Which one of the following is an accurate list of changes that are captured in an Update Set?

choices.text: Changes made to: tables, forms, schedules, and client scripts
Changes made to: tables, forms, Business Rules, and data records
Changes made to: tables, forms, groups, and configuration items (CIs)
Changes made to: table, forms, views, and fields

questions.question: What are the steps to retrieve an Update Set?

choices.text: Verify Update Set is Complete, Retrieve, Preview, Apply
Verify Update Set is Complete, Test Connection, Apply
Verify Update Set is Complete, Test Connection, Commit
Verify Update Set is Complete, Retrieve, Preview, Commit

questions.question: IntegrationHub enables execution of third-party APIs as a part of a flow. These integrations are referred to as:
Which of the following protects applications by identifying and restricting access to available files and data?
Which one statement correctly describes Access Control rule evaluation?

choices.text: Table access rules are evaluated from the general to the specific
If more than one rule applies to a record, the older rule is evaluated first
If a row level rule and a field level rule exist, both rules must be true before an operation is allowed
The role with the most permissions evaluates the rules first

questions.question: ServiceNow contains a resource which provides the following: A standard and shared set of service-related definitions across ServiceNow products and platform that will enable and support true service level reporting. A CMDB framework across our products and platform that will enable and support multiple configuration strategies. What resource do these statements describe?
An IT manager cannot see any tasks on the Service Desk > My Groups Work list. What could explain this?

choices.text: The Service Desk > My Groups Work list shows active work tasks that are not yet assigned
The manager does not have the itil role
The manager is not a member of the Service Desk group
The manager is not a member of the Network and Hardware groups
The Assignment Group manager field is empty

questions.question: What do you need to do before you can use an Application-based trigger in your flow?

choices.text: Activate application spoke, and plug-ins as needed
Assign Application trigger role [sn_app_trigger_write] to SME

questions.question: The ServiceNow platform includes which types of interfaces? (Choose three.)
Which of the following are not included in an Update Set, by default? (Choose four.)
You are showing your customer a new form that you have created for their new application. They would like to add a field to the form. Where could you do that? (Choose two.)

choices.text: Right click on form header, select Configure > Form Layout
Click on context menu, select Configure > Form Designer

questions.question: Which ServiceNow resource is a framework that ensures the data your ServiceNow application requires maps correctly to the appropriate CMDB tables?
What do you activate when you want to add applications or functionality within your development instance?
What field contains a record's 32-character, unique identifier?
Your company wants only first line workers (non-managers) to order a T-shirt. How would you ensure that only first line workers can submit the order?

choices.text: Create Record Producer and use the Available For list to specify First Line [sn_first_line] role
Create Catalog Item and use the Not Available list to specify the Manager Group
Create Catalog Item and use the Available For list to specify ITIL [itil] role
Create Order Guide and use the User Criteria list to specify First Line [sn_first_line] role

questions.question: What is used frequently to move customizations from one instance to another?
What icon do you use to change the label on a Favorite?
What needs to be specified, when creating a Business Rule? (Choose four.)
What feature can track the amount of time that a task has been open, to ensure that tasks are completed within an allotted time?
What is a quick way to create a report from a list view?

choices.text: Click on filter breadcrumb, drag and drop on the Report > Create New module
Click Funnel, define filter conditions, click Create Report
Click Context Menu, select Create Report
Apply filter, right click on column header, select Bar Chart
Apply filter, right click on column header, select Create Report

questions.question: What import utility do you use when the field names on the import set match the name of the fields on the Target table?
As an IT employee what interface would you use, if you wanted to browse internal IT documentation, like troubleshooting scripts and FAQs?
A new Service Desk employee in Latin America complains that the create dates and times are incorrect on their Incident list. What would you suggest to fix this issue?

choices.text: Have them use the gear icon to set the employee's time zone.
Recommend they use Chrome, instead of Explorer.
Use the system properties to correct the instance's time zone.
Have them correct the time zone on their computer.

questions.question: What are three security modules often used by the System Administrator? (Choose three.)
When testing a catalog item, having a manager approval flows, which of these best practices would you follow? (Choose three.)

choices.text: Make sure the latest flows are activated.
Use the instance Incognito setting to quickly toggle between requester and approver.
Impersonate the requester to ensure the form works.
Make sure the requester's user record has a manager specified.
Create and select your Testing Update Set, before starting the test cases.
Use your Admin account, so you can approve the items quickly.

questions.question: What is a no-code approach to control the mandatory or read-only state of a form field?
When moving multiple update sets at one time, what might you do to facilitate the move?
What is specified in an Access Control rule?

choices.text: Table Schema, CRUD, and User Authentication
Object and Operation being secured; Permissions required to access the object

questions.question: Which icon would you double click, to expand and collapse the list of all Applications and Modules?
What do you call any component that needs to be managed in order to deliver services?
A new service catalog item is being developed, but should only be visible to managers inside the HR Department. What method would you use to fulfill this requirement?

choices.text: Specify the Dept_Mgr role on the catalog content block
Add the Department Manager group to the catalog item's user criteria
Add the Department Manager group to the catalog item's ACL
Only publish the item in the HR service catalog
Use a Dept_Mgr ACL on the HR service catalog

questions.question: A user wants to create a set of filter conditions… Incidents where the state is Closed; Incidents where Assignment Group is Network. After clicking the Funnel icon, what should the user do?

choices.text: Define the first condition; click AND button; define second condition; click Run
Define the first condition; click AND button; define second condition; press enter
Define the first condition; click OR button; define second condition; press enter
Define the first condition; click > icon on breadcrumb, define second condition; click Run
Define the first condition; click > icon on breadcrumb, define second condition; press enter

questions.question: Access Control rules are applied to a specific table… What is the object name for a rule that is specific to the Incident table and the Major Incident field?
Two departments (HR Onboarding and Facilities)… same requirements… both have their own catalogs. What do you do?

choices.text: Create one Catalog Item for HR and one for Facilities; publish each to its Catalog.
Create one Catalog Item for Event Room Set Up; then publish to both Catalogs.
Publish to the Parent Catalog accessible to both HR and Facilities.

questions.question: After finishing your work on High Security Settings, what do you do to return to normal admin security levels?

choices.text: Use System Administration > Normal Security module

questions.question: What type of field allows you to look up values from one other table?
Which module would you use to create a new automation of business logic such as approvals, tasks, and notifications?
A department manager asks an analyst to build some reports. Where do you recommend the analyst start?
What are the steps for applying an update set to an instance?
When importing spreadsheet data into ServiceNow, in which step does the data get written to the receiving table?
What would you do, on a list, if you wanted to show the records in groups, based on the column category? (Choose two.)

choices.text: On list Context Menu, select Group By > Category
On the Filter Menu, select Group By > Category
Click Group On icon, select Category
Navigator Filter: type tablename.group.category and press enter
On the Category column title, Context menu > Group By Category

questions.question: Which collaboration tool is available from the banner, using the bubble icon?
On the knowledge base record, which tab defines which users are not able to write articles to the knowledge base?
Which features allow you to update multiple records at one time? (Choose two.)
Categories in the knowledge base, by default, can be created and edited by which knowledge workers? (Choose two.)
Which collaboration tool opens a sidebar and allows you to create new conversations with other ServiceNow users?
What module would you use to view a list of all of the fields on the Incident table? (Choose two.)
What component causes a flow to run after a record has been created or updated?

Which module is used to access the knowledge bases which are available to you?

Which module would you use to customize your instance’s banner image, text and colors?
Which database provides a logical model of your company infrastructure by identifying, controlling…?
Which module is used as the first step for importing data?
When you need to orchestrate business processes across services with little technical user knowledge, which utility would you use?
When a user reports that they are not able to see modules on the application navigator, what can you do to see what modules are visible to them?

choices.text: Look up their password, so you can login with their account

questions.question: What is a key difference between Reporting and Performance Analytics?

choices.text: Performance Analytics contains snapshots of data taken over time; Reporting shows the data as it is when the report is run.
Performance Analytics can show trends; Reports cannot.
Reports can be run on a scheduled basis; Performance Analytics cannot.
Performance Analytics data can be published to Dashboards; Reports cannot.
Performance Analytics shows KPIs; Reporting does not.

questions.question: While showing a customer their incident form, they ask to change Priority values (P1, P2, P3, P4)… What do you select?
Your customer would like to create a new template to notify users affected by outages. Which module would you use to create a new notification?

choices.text: Drag the table icon onto the flow definition
Use the condition builder to specify the desired values
Specify the source table on the data pill related list

questions.question: On the Reports page, what sections allow you to see which reports are visible to different audiences? (Choose four.)

questions.question: What controls the publishing and retiring process for knowledge articles?

choices.text: One Approval can have many Requests

choices.text: A set of user access policies

choices.text: Group members can choose tasks from My Groups Work

choices.text: Ensures field access before table access

choices.text: Merge Default update sets before moving

questions.question: Where in the instance do you find the option to Impersonate User?
Which application is used primarily to load data into ServiceNow?
If a knowledge base has no access details specified, who can read articles?

choices.text: Any user with an article’s permalink

questions.question: How would you define an Access Control to allow itil to create Incident records?

choices.text: Name: incident.None; Operation: create; Role: itil
Name: incident.Any; Operation: write; Permission: itil
Name: incident :; Permission: write; Role: itil
Name: incident.None; Permission: create; Role: itil
Name: incident :; Operation: write; Permission: itil

questions.question: What Service Catalog feature do you use to organize items into logical groups?
When creating a new notification, what must you define? (Choose three)

choices.text: Under what conditions the notification is sent
What the content of the notification is

questions.question: The ServiceNow platform supports a wide Variety of plug-and-play applications. You can choose from the included workflows of build your own workflow: Which of these workflows are included in the platform? (Choose three)

An IT manager is responsible for the Network and Hardware assignment groups, each group contains 5 team members. These team members are working on many tasks, but the manager cannot see any tasks on the Service Desk > My Groups Work list. What could explain this?

choices.text: The Assignment Group manager field is empty.
The manager does not have the itil role.
The manager is not a member of the Service Desk group.
The manager is not a member of the Network and Hardware groups.

questions.question: You have been asked to configure a form so an employee could order tablet and select the standard accessory options to Purchase with it. These standard Options are: carrying case, screen cleaner, tablet stand, and screen protector. What approach would you take? (Choose three.)

choices.text: Create Catalog Item for the Tablet, and add a variable set to the form, for the accessory options.
Create a Record Producer, and on the form, add a check box variable for each accessory option.
On Shopping Cart configuration, select option lo show the Add Accessories button.
Create one Catalog item for each: tablet, carrying case, screen cleaner, tablet stand, and screen protector.
Create Catalog Item for the tablet, and on the form, add a check box variable for each accessory option.

questions.question: Which ServiceNow utility provides a modern interactive graphical interface to visualize configuration items and their relationships?
What is the definition of a group?

choices.text: A collection of subject matter experts

questions.question: On the Reports page, what sections allow you to see which reports are visible to different audiences? (Choose four)

What module enables an administrator to define destinations for imported data on any ServiceNow table?
On the Form header, which icon do you use to access form templates?
When using the Data Pill Picker, which keys do you use to dot-walk to fields in other tables?
In what order are Access Controls evaluated?

The Report Designer contains different sections for configuring your report. Which section is used to specify grouping and calculations?
What icon do you use to change the icon and color on a Favorite?

choices.text: Search the wiki for the sales demo request form
Check the latest release notes at docs.servicenow.com
Activate the application plug-in on your personal dev instance
Activate the application plug-in on your company’s production instance

questions.question: When looking at a long list of records, you want to quickly filter to show only those with Category = Hardware. How?

choices.text: On Category column header, right click and select Show > Hardware
Right click on magnifier, type Hardware and click enter
On the list, locate and right click on Hardware value, select Show Matching
On Breadcrumb, click > icon, type Hardware and click enter
Click Funnel icon, type Hardware and click enter

questions.question: When looking at a long list of records, you want to quickly filter to show only those with Short Description containing “email.” How?

choices.text: Click List Magnifier, on Short Description type email, click enter
On Search box, select text, type email, click enter
Click List Magnifier, on Short Description type *email, click enter
Click List Magnifier, on Short Description type %email, click enter

questions.question: When importing spreadsheet data into ServiceNow, what is the first step in the process?
Tables may be set up with Many to Many relationships. Classic example?

choices.text: Vendors can sell multiple products; products can be sold by multiple vendors
A Task can trigger many Workflows; a Workflow can trigger many Tasks
Requests can contain many Items; Items can be any item from the catalog
A Configuration Item can belong to multiple Classes; Classes can contain multiple Configuration Items

questions.question: What section on a task record would you use to see the most recent update made to a record?
Employee Onboarding team wants managers to order computers, monitors, business cards, and cell phones for new employees. How would you proceed?
On the CI Dependency View, what enables you to trace from an infrastructure item, like a Server, to the Services that depend on that Server?
From a related list, what would a user click to personalize the layout of the columns?
What is the language used for scripting in ServiceNow?
What are examples of UI Actions relating to Lists? (Choose four.)

A Service Catalog project will involve building 80 catalog items. Each form must have four mandatory fields: Requested for, Requested by, Approving manager, Delivery instructions. What feature would you use?

choices.text: Create a Variable Set Template, then apply to all catalog items
Create one Variable Set for the four variables, then add that variable set to each catalog item
Create a Record Producer that contains the four fields; then add to the record producer related list on the Catalog Items
Create a Flow Designer Action, with Variable Set Data Pill, then apply flow to all catalog items
Create an Order Guide, which includes all variables; then copy and hide variables as needed

questions.question: A task worker asks how they can monitor updates occurring to records assigned to them, like responses from customers. What do you suggest?

choices.text: On My Work list, select the Activity Stream icon to show a frame with live updates
Click on the eyeglass icon to expand the Monitor frame
Open an Agent workspace tab for each record they want to monitor
Select Service Desk > My Work Dashboard

questions.question: What access does a user need to be able to import articles to a knowledge base?
When importing data from a spreadsheet, which step defines where the incoming data columns will be written in the receiving table?
To apply a UI Policy to all views, which field should be set to true in its definition record?
What are the steps for importing data using an import set?

choices.text: Select source file; Run automap; Transform data; Clean up target table
Identify source; Import transform map; Run transformer; Verify import
Setup LDAP; Test map; Create update set; Run import; Apply update set
Load the data; Create transform map; Transform data; Clean up import table

questions.question: Which type of scripts run in the browser?
Which modules can you use to create a new table? (Choose two.)
Which one of the following describes the primary operations performed against tables in the ServiceNow platform?
How is a user defined in ServiceNow?

choices.text: A user is a record stored in the Profile [sys_user_profile] table
A user is a record stored in the User [sys_user] table
A user is a record stored in the User Preference [sys_user_preference] table
A user is a field in the LDAP integration

questions.question: Which ServiceNow utility gives a Service Desk agent the ability to trace from a Service having an issue, to see which CIs supporting that service have active issues?
Which feature enables business process owners to organize Flow Designer content into unified and digitized cross-enterprise processes via a digitized task board interface?
An IT user calls the service desk because they need to work on task records. All they can see is Self Service on their homepage. What issue could explain this? (Choose two.)

choices.text: Their user account does not have itil role
Their user account was not approved by their manager
Their user account is not logged in properly
Their user account failed LDAP authentication
Their user account does not belong to any groups which contain the itil role

questions.question: On a related list, which buttons are commonly used for managing the records on the list? (Choose three.)

choices.text: Click Context menu > Add Tag > type Special Handling > press enter
Click More options (…) > Add Tag > type Special Handling > press enter
On the Tag field, select Special Handling from the choice list
On the Special Handling field, check the box

questions.question: What feature allows you to limit who is able to contribute or read knowledge within a knowledge base?
When moving a homepage or dashboard between instances, what must you remember?

choices.text: Manually add them to the update set
They cannot be moved via update set
They are automatically added to the update set
Create a separate update set for them

questions.question: What is the platform name for the Group table?

The Report Designer contains different sections for configuring your report. Which section is used to adjust the look of your report, including colors, titles and legend layout?
How would you distinguish between a Base Class table and a Parent Class table?

choices.text: Extended tables are always extended from Parent tables. Extended tables are usually extended from Base tables.
Extended tables can be extended from Parent tables or Base tables; but they cannot be extended from both.
Base Class tables always have tables extended from them. Parent tables do not have tables extended from them.
Base Class table is not extended from another table, Parent class tables may be extended from another table

questions.question: When a custom table is created, which access control rules are automatically created? (Choose four.)

When building an extended table from a base table, which fields do you need to create? (Choose two.)

choices.text: The fields that are not in the base table
The mandatory fields for the base table
The fields that are specific to the extended table
The reference fields for the base table

questions.question: While showing a customer their Incident form, they ask to change the Priority field title to display their internal terminology PValue. How would you do that? (Choose two.)

choices.text: Right click on Priority and select Configure Label
Right click on Priority and select Configure Dictionary
Right click on Priority and select Configure Display Settings
Right click on Priority and select Configure Column

questions.question: As administrator, what must you do to access features of High Security Settings?

choices.text: Add security_admin role to your user account
Use System Administration > Elevate Roles module

questions.question: What section on the notes tab shows the history of the work documented on the record?

choices.text: System Definition > Tables; Select Table; Go to Related links and click Show Schema Map
System Dictionary > Show Schema Map; Select Table
System Definition > Show Schema Map; Select Table
System Definition > Dictionary; Select Table; Go to Related links and click Show Schema Map

questions.question: Which is the base table of the configuration management database hierarchy?

choices.text: A field is a table row.
A field is an item that appears in a menu list.

A field is a record in a table.

questions.question: What are examples of UI Actions relating to forms? (Choose three.)
Example of criteria set for a knowledge base: Companies: ACME North America; Departments: HR; Groups: ACME Managers; Match All: Yes. Who has access?

choices.text: Members of ACME Manager group, who are also members of HR Department and part of ACME North America
Employees of ACME North America, who are members of HR Department or ACME Managers group
Users which are members of either ACME North America, or HR Department, or ACME Managers group
Members of the ACME Managers group, and HR department, regardless of geography

questions.question: In Flow Designer, where is the data from an action stored so it can be used in subsequent actions in the flow?

choices.text: Update email notification named "System Upgraded" in System Logs module
Update email notification named "System Upgraded" in Notifications module

Write a Business Rule to send email when Update is complete

questions.question: A customer wants to identify and track components of their infrastructure that support their eCommerce service. What ServiceNow products could support this requirement? (Choose three.)

choices.text: Super Incident table is a Parent table
Incident table is a Child table
Super Incident table is a Base table
Incident table is a Base table
Task table is a Child table
Incident table is a Parent table
Super Incident table is a Child table
Task table is a Parent table
Task table is a Base table

choices.text: Tables which allow write access to other applications

choices.text: Script that sets the answer variable to true or false

choices.text: Incident table has a one to many relationship with the Task table
Incident table is extended from Task table
Incident table is related to the Task table via the INC number
Incident table has a many to many relationship with the Task table

questions.question: Which flow components allow you to specify when a flow should be run?

The Report Designer contains different sections for configuring your report. Which section is used to specify the name of the report, and the table or data source for the report?
You are editing a new incident record and would like the "Save" button to be located on the Form header. Which action would need to be taken for that button to appear?

choices.text: Context Menu > Form Design > add the "Save" button.
All > System Properties > UI Properties > Turn on the "glide.ui.advanced" property.
All > System Properties > UI Properties > Turn on the "Save" button.

questions.question: You are looking at a list of Active Incidents. You want to exclude Incidents with the state of Resolved. How might you do that?

choices.text: On Search, select State, type not Resolved, press enter
On State column title, right-click, select Filter Out > Resolved
On the list of records, locate and right-click on the Resolved value, select Filter Out
On the list of records, locate and right-click on the Resolved value, select Exclude
Click Funnel icon, click AND, Select Resolved, is Not, State, click Run

choices.text: Setting fields to accept the data in an expected format
Setting fields to accept the data with 'n' number of characters

choices.text: In the Navigation Filter, type "requests.list" and press Enter

questions.question: Which path would you take to access the table configuration page from a form?

choices.text: The Form Context menu > View > Show Table
The Form Context menu > View > Table
